title: Vegetables Peeler Advanced Ceramic Peeler Plastic Handel-Sharp Rust Prevention -Set of 3
features: Vegetable peeler for cucumber peels, carrots, potatoes, apples and all other vegetables
Intelligent design: Two side potato eye remover for easy removal of small fruit or vegetable holes
Sharp and rust protection: The blade of the peeler is made of ceramic and the handle is made of plastic, easy to clean and anti-rust
Y peeler is ergonomically designed, the handle is made of ceramic ABS material, very environmentally friendly, necessary kitchen utensils
Peelers Characteristic, save time and labor, safe and easy to use
description: Product Description 3-Color Y-Shaped Peeler Time to equip your kitchen with this awesome peeler tool, with no moving parts or fancy features. For all your peeling needs including apples, carrots, cucumbers, potatoes, tomatoes and more. Meet your basic kitchen needs for making unique, healthy and delicious meals. Finger Groove Design Comfortable to Hold,Easy to use,Non-Slip Y-type peeler size: 13*6*0.7 CM/5*2.4*0.27 inch Ergonomic handle groove design. Suitable for left or right handed use. Using the small triangle on the side of the Y peeler allows you to quickly remove potato eyes, apple spots etc. Suitable for potatoes, apples,carrot, etc Perforated handle for hanging on the kitchen wall
